summary: Iteration 54: Complete testing of RdP and OdA Line Items features. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components working correctly. Fixed bug where commessaNumero was not being passed to CommessaOpsPanel.

issues: React warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined}' for DialogContent - cosmetic accessibility warning, not affecting functionality

rdp_line_items.create_rdp_single_line: PASS - RdP with single line item including richiede_cert_31
rdp_line_items.create_rdp_multiple_lines: PASS - RdP with 3 lines (Lamiera, Tubo, Bulloneria), mixed cert requirements
rdp_line_items.rdp_righe_persisted_in_ops: PASS - GET /ops returns righe with all fields

oda_line_items.create_oda_with_pricing: PASS - OdA stores prezzo_unitario and calculates importo_totale (415.00)
oda_line_items.auto_calculates_total: PASS - Backend auto-calculates total from righe when not provided
oda_line_items.respects_provided_total: PASS - Uses explicit importo_totale when given (discount scenario)
oda_line_items.cert_31_flag: PASS - richiede_cert_31 stored correctly for each riga
oda_line_items.oda_righe_persisted_in_ops: PASS - GET /ops returns ordine righe with pricing

unita_misura.all_units_accepted: PASS - kg, pz, ml, mq, t all accepted in righe

rdp_dialog.line_items_table: PASS - Table with Descrizione, Quantità, U.M., Cert. 3.1 columns
rdp_dialog.add_line_button: PASS - 'Aggiungi riga' button adds new row
rdp_dialog.remove_line_button: PASS - Trash icon removes row (visible when >1 row)
rdp_dialog.cert_31_checkbox: PASS - Checkbox toggleable for each row
rdp_dialog.commessa_reference: PASS - 'Riferimento: Commessa {numero}' shown in dialog header

oda_dialog.line_items_table: PASS - Table with Descrizione, Quantità, U.M., Prezzo Unit., Importo, 3.1 columns
oda_dialog.price_input: PASS - Prezzo Unitario input accepts decimal values
oda_dialog.importo_column: PASS - Importo auto-calculated per row (qty × price)
oda_dialog.total_calculation: PASS - Total updates in real-time as prices/quantities change
oda_dialog.commessa_reference: PASS - 'Riferimento: Commessa {numero}' shown in dialog header

critical_code_review_comments: RigaRdP and RigaOdA Pydantic models correctly include richiede_cert_31: bool field
Backend auto-calculates importo_totale from righe when not provided
Frontend correctly filters empty description lines before API call
OdA Importo column shows calculated value (qty × price) per row
Totale Ordine updates reactively using useMemo-like calculation
commessaNumero now correctly passed as c?.numero (hub.commessa.numero)

seed_data_creation: Created test commessa com_uitest_1772285818520 with numero COM-UI-1772285818520, test fornitore 'Fornitore Test UI'
context_for_next_testing_agent: RdP and OdA line items features fully tested. Key changes: CommessaOpsPanel.js has detailed line items tables for RdP/OdA dialogs with Descrizione, Quantità, U.M., Cert. 3.1 fields. OdA additionally has Prezzo Unitario and auto-calculated Importo. Backend models RigaRdP/RigaOdA in commessa_ops.py support all fields. Fixed bug in CommessaHubPage.js where commessaNumero was incorrectly passed as hub?.numero instead of c?.numero.

bugs_fixed.issue: commessaNumero was passed as hub?.numero but should be c?.numero (hub.commessa.numero)
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed prop from hub?.numero to c?.numero
bugs_fixed.impact: Commessa reference now correctly displays in RdP/OdA dialog headers
